data.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** User-Flagged Behavior

#### Expected Behavior

After `bash <(curl ...)/scripts/create-dso-app.sh <project>` completes and claude launches into the project directory, `.claude/scripts/dso` shim must exist and be executable so subsequent slash commands like `/dso:brainstorm` can invoke ticket subcommands via the shim.

#### Actual Behavior

User reports that running `/dso:brainstorm` immediately after create-dso-app finishes produces an error: `no such file .claude/scripts/dso`.

#### Possible Causes (to investigate)

1. claude may be launched in the directory where create-dso-app was run, not the project dir — but lines 637-638 of scripts/create-dso-app.sh do `cd "$project_dir"; exec claude`, so this should work if main() reaches that point.
2. The shim install fallback at lines 611-621 may not be creating the shim — `_shim_template` path could be wrong in some plugin layouts, or cp could fail silently.
3. Older versions of create-dso-app.sh may not have included the cd or shim fallback.

#### Files involved

- scripts/create-dso-app.sh (lines 611-621 shim fallback, lines 637-638 cd+exec claude)
- plugins/dso/templates/host-project/dso (shim template that gets copied)
data.title: [create-dso-app.sh]: Shim missing after install -> /brainstorm fails with 'no such file .claude/scripts/dso'
